results.title: [Respiratory distress syndrome in premature births].
results.abstract: The paper reports the results of a study of respiratory distress syndrome in premature birth, one of the most common and important forms of respiratory disorders affecting neonates during the first days of life. One hundred and fifty-six premature births from 1 January 1986 to 30 June 1988 were included in the study. From an analysis of results it emerges that there is a lower incidence of respiratory distress syndrome in both vaginal deliveries and cases treated with Ambroxol.
